selected_backend_rows.decision_decision: Do not broaden the SM120 direct-cuBLAS dInput selector to attention projection. Both the bundled attproj/MLP-up selector and the later attproj-only selector regressed in x10 TinyStories stability gates, so the source default remains the huge-N LM-head-only direct-cuBLAS dInput route.
decision_evidence: 2026-05-21 candidate selector round codex_sm120_round_cublas_dinp_attproj_fc_20260521 validated at avg_ms=2493.931
2026-05-21 x10 stability round codex_sm120_round_cublas_dinp_attproj_fc_x10_20260521 regressed to avg_ms=2502.950 versus current stable x10 2495.443 ms

2026-05-21 attproj-only selector hook LLMK_SM120_USE_CUBLAS_DINP_ATTPROJ passed all native smokes and 3-step validation at avg_ms=2491.581, but x10 stability round scratch/sm120_rounds/codex_sm120_round_cublas_dinp_attproj_only_x10_20260521 regressed to avg_ms=2503.023 versus current native x10 avg_ms=2493.133
selected_backend_rows.decision_note: Trainer-callable route, but default promotion still requires route-specific correctness and TinyStories smoke evidence.
selected_backend_rows.shape: attproj M=65536 N=768 K=768 bias=1 gelu=0

selected_backend_rows.decision_decision: Do not promote the SM120 direct-cuBLAS dInput selector to the GPT-2 MLP-up row. The microbench row can favor cuBLAS, but both the broader attproj+MLP-up selector and the later FC-only selector regressed in x10 TinyStories stability gates, while the stream-sync default keeps cuBLASLt for this row and improves the trainer smoke.
decision_evidence: 2026-05-21 optional stack refresh selected cuBLAS 1328.470 us versus cuBLASLt 1367.640 us for MLP-up dInput
2026-05-21 direct-cuBLAS attproj/MLP-up dInput selector x10 round validated but regressed to avg_ms=2502.950 versus the current stable x10 default 2495.443 ms
2026-05-21 stream-sync default x10 native round selected cuBLAS in the isolated microbench at 1327.730 us but keeps the source selector on cuBLASLt and validated at avg_ms=2493.133

2026-05-21 FC-only selector hook LLMK_SM120_USE_CUBLAS_DINP_FC passed all native smokes and 3-step validation at avg_ms=2490.977, but x10 stability round scratch/sm120_rounds/codex_sm120_round_cublas_dinp_fc_only_x10_20260521 regressed to avg_ms=2504.399 versus current native x10 avg_ms=2493.133

selection_policy: Fastest observed row per exact suite/kernel/shape. Rows without an existing trainer call path remain reference/operator prototypes until route-specific correctness and TinyStories smoke evidence proves promotion. Repo-local decisions mark refreshed rejects and structurally non-promotable rows inactive without deleting their evidence.
